About the Game

What is Elemental Arena?

A tactical tabletop arena battle game where players take on the role of powerful Binders — commanders who summon and control elemental creatures in strategic, one-on-one combat. Each match is a test of positioning, timing, and adaptability.

Every Elemental belongs to one of four elements — Fire, Water, Ground, or Air — each with its own strengths and weaknesses. Players focus on a small, carefully chosen team and swap Elementals in and out of battle to control the flow of the fight. Every role plays differently — and every decision matters.

You are a Binder
Summon and command elemental creatures — beings of fire, ground, wind, and water — and pit them against your opponent in tactical arena combat where every decision matters.
A Living Battlefield
The hex-based board is not just a stage — it is a weapon. Positioning, spacing, and zone control are as important as raw power. One well-timed swap can undo your opponent's entire strategy.
Build Your Roster
Choose 3–6 Elementals, each with unique roles and abilities. Balance speed, power, and survivability. No two rosters play the same — there is no dominant strategy, only clever ones.
Last Binder Standing
Eliminate your opponent's Elementals one by one. The last Binder with creatures standing claims the Crucible. Simple to learn, endlessly deep to master.
Combat Roles

Within each element, every Elemental is further defined by one of three combat roles — each demanding a completely different playstyle and approach to the arena. Understanding how roles interact is the key to building a winning team.

The Titan
Durable & Unyielding
Built to absorb punishment and hold the line. Titans are slow but nearly impossible to move once planted.
The Anchor
Balanced & Versatile
The backbone of any team. Anchors balance offense and defense, adapting to whatever the arena demands.
The Catalyst
High Risk, High Reward
Glass cannons that can turn a match in an instant. Catalysts hit hard but require precise timing to survive.

Meet the Elementals

Eight Elementals. Infinite Strategies.

Eight unique Elementals across four elements. Each brings a distinct role and playstyle. Choose your team wisely.

The Arena

Same Arena. Different Battle Every Time.

The arena itself never changes — but the battle always does. Terrain obstacles shift the flow of combat, cutting off movement lanes and forcing positional decisions that can make or break your strategy. No two games play out the same way.

The Binder's Crucible — Hex Arena with Terrain Playtest Available Now

How It Plays

Five Steps to the Crucible

Each match is a duel of wits and positioning. Here is how a game unfolds from first pick to final blow.

1
Build Your Team
Choose 3–6 Elementals. Balance speed, power, and survivability to craft your strategy.
2
Take Turns
Players alternate controlling one Elemental per turn. Attack, swap, guard, or channel energy.
3
Manage Energy
Abilities cost stamina. Powerful moves have cooldowns. Every action is a trade-off.
4
Outplay Your Opponent
Positioning, timing, and smart swaps decide the battle. One mistake can change everything.
5
Claim the Crucible
Eliminate your opponent's Elementals one by one. Last Binder standing wins.

Try It Now

The Crucible is Open

Free to Play
Playtest on Tabletop Simulator
The full game is available right now on Tabletop Simulator. Jump in, build a team, and put the mechanics to the test. Every playtest helps shape the final game.
Play on Tabletop Simulator Leave Your Feedback

Requires Tabletop Simulator on Steam. The mod is free.

Get Your Name in the Rulebook
Complete the playtest survey after your game and your name might be credited in the official Elemental Arena rulebook as a founding playtester.

Current Status

Development Update

Elemental Arena is in active development. Here is where things stand heading into our Kickstarter campaign.

Game Design
Rules & Mechanics
Playtesting
Core rules are in place and the game is fully playable — but we are actively playtesting and tweaking mechanics based on real player feedback. Jump in on Tabletop Simulator and help shape the final ruleset.
Miniatures
8 Elementals
In Progress
First two models complete, third currently underway. All eight will be professionally sculpted before the Kickstarter launch.
Board & Card Art
Human-Made Art
In Progress
Board art arriving end of April. All artwork commissioned from human artists.
Overall Progress — Kickstarter Target: May 202735%

Estimated launch: May 2027

The Core Game

Everything You Need to Play

One box. Everything included. No extra purchases required to sit down and play a full game.

8
Miniatures
One professionally sculpted miniature for each of the eight Elementals.
1
Arena Board
The full hex arena board with four elemental zone corners — Fire, Water, Ground, and Air.
8
Player Cards
One full stat and ability reference card for each Elemental — everything you need at a glance.
1
Rulebook
The complete Elemental Arena rulebook — with credits for every playtester who helped shape the game.
All
Dice & Cooldown Markers
Every die and cooldown marker required to play a full game — no extra purchases needed.
All
Status & Swap Tokens
All tokens needed to play — Poison, Shock, Guard, Freeze, Focus, and Swap tokens. Multiple of each included.
2
Turn Reference Cards
One per player — a quick reference for actions, abilities, and turn order so the game keeps moving.
4+
Terrain Pieces
4 terrain pieces included. More is recommended — additional terrain changes movement lanes and forces new strategies every game.

Two Ways to Enter the Arena

All the files you need to bring Elemental Arena to your table — print the cards, download the rulebook, and use the STL files to print your own miniatures.

The Complete Game
The full Elemental Arena experience — everything in the box, ready to play straight out of the packaging. No printing, no assembly required.
8 professional miniatures
Full printed board & cards
All dice, tokens & components
Printed rulebook with playtester credits

Pricing and full tier details revealed at Kickstarter launch

Free Download

Print the Pyestalker — Free

Want a taste of the arena before Kickstarter launches? Download the official Pyestalker STL file for free — print it, paint it, and bring the Fire Anchor to life on your own table.

The Pyestalker
The first official Elemental Arena miniature — a Fire Anchor built for holding the line and burning everything in its path. Fully print-ready STL file, free to download and print at home.

Our Story

Who Made It

The Designer
John Hughes
Independent designer and tabletop enthusiast — with a little help from his first playtester.
His 6-year-old son.
Why It Was Made
"Fast, strategic — easy to learn, hard to master."
Built to capture the excitement of tactical combat without the complexity of large-scale war games. Something you can sit down and play with your kids, your friends, or someone brand new to tabletop gaming.
The Vision
Elemental Arena is just the beginning.
Eight elementals across four elements — each with their own identity and role. Future expansions will bring new elementals, new strategies, and even larger-scale battles into the arena.
Create moments where every move feels important — and every battle tells a story.

Enter the Crucible
